name: Stuffed Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Cut the tops off the peppers and remove the seeds.
3. Place the peppers on a tray and roast for about 30 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, cook the rice according to package directions. Add the chopped onion, Creole spice (or your preferred seasoning), and frozen vegetables with a little extra water. Cook the rice in this mixture.
5. Once the peppers and rice are done, remove the peppers from the oven.
6. Stuff each pepper with the cooked rice and serve.
Note: The leftovers make a great lunch option.
